purpose: Conservative denylist for anything that must not ship in a public ArgentOS Core repo until the boundary is intentionally split.
notes: This denylist is intentionally stricter than the current staging manifest.
If a path is denylisted here, the exporter should exclude it even if a broad include glob would otherwise copy it.
Some denylisted files are mixed hotspots that will need refactoring before a public Core build can be complete.

rules.reason: Internal operator guidance, handoff notes, and packaging strategy docs are not public product assets and can leak operating detail you do not need to ship.
Commercial licensing, activation, and secret-sync logic is part of the paid boundary and should not ship in public Core as-is.
Hierarchical policy, simulation gates, and intent administration are Business control-plane features rather than public Core magic.
Workforce setup, job orchestration, approval flows, and guided intake belong on the Business side until the product boundary is deliberately exposed.
The current settings/admin surfaces and dashboard API are mixed with Business-only controls. Exclude them until the Core-safe slices are separated.
These storage files still embed workforce and org-only schema. Keeping them public before they are carved apart would leak more of the Business boundary than intended.
